key_quote: In March 2025, KPS completed the acquisition of INEOS Composites, forming Alta Performance Materials as a new platform company.
buyer_intelligence: KPS formed new platform company Alta Performance Materials
notes: Carve-out completed March 2025, rebranded as Alta Performance Materials

key_quote: Platinum Equity completed the acquisition of the Owens & Minor Products & Healthcare Services business on December 31, 2025. The seller retained a five percent interest in the business.
buyer_intelligence: Platinum leveraging 30 years of carve-out experience. Seller retained 5% stake. Business continues to operate as Owens & Minor P&HS.
notes: Healthcare supply chain carve-out completed Dec 31, 2025. Seller rebranded remaining business as Accendra Health.

key_quote: Heidrick & Struggles completed a take-private transaction led by Advent International and Corvex Private Equity, valued at approximately $1.3 billion in December 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Take-private of entire company by Advent and Corvex consortium
notes: Whole company take-private, not a carve-out

key_quote: AURELIUS acquired the Care Division of family-owned Dutch company Louwman Group in November 2025. The Care Division generated €150m in revenue in 2024 and employs 715 people.
buyer_intelligence: Carve-out from family-owned Dutch conglomerate. 90,000+ customers across Netherlands.
notes: Healthcare services carve-out completed November 2025

key_quote: AURELIUS acquired TAT-NA from Teijin Limited in March 2025, marking the first transaction advised by the AURELIUS Investment Advisory team in New York. TAT-NA employs approximately 4,500 personnel and generates annual revenues exceeding USD 1 billion.
buyer_intelligence: First US transaction for AURELIUS NY advisory team. Large-scale automotive components manufacturer.
notes: Major automotive composites carve-out - 4,500 employees, $1B+ revenue

key_quote: Lion Equity Partners, a Denver-based private equity firm specializing in corporate carve-outs, acquired Global Compression Services from Warren Equipment Company in January 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Lion Equity specializes in carve-outs. Completed in January 2025.
notes: Compression services equipment business

key_quote: Audax Private Equity completed its acquisition of the clinical services business of Avantor, Inc. and re-branded the business as Resonant Clinical Solutions in October 2024.
buyer_intelligence: Carve-out completed and rebranded. Transaction actually closed in 2024.
notes: Clinical services for pharmaceutical/biotech - completed 2024, not 2025

key_quote: Triton completes carve-out of MacGregor, acquired from Hiab, formerly Cargotec in August 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Triton specializes in European carve-outs. MacGregor is marine cargo handling equipment.
notes: Marine/offshore equipment carve-out completed August 2025

key_quote: Triton exits Renk with sale of remaining shares in September 2025, concluding a five-year partnership that began with Triton's carve-out of Renk from Volkswagen.
buyer_intelligence: Triton originally carved out Renk from VW, held for 5 years, exited via IPO/sale in 2025
notes: This is an exit, not an acquisition. Triton carved out Renk previously and exited in 2025.

key_quote: HIG buys Kantar Media in carve-out from Kantar Group in August 2025.
buyer_intelligence: H.I.G. Capital active in media/data carve-outs
notes: Media intelligence and monitoring services carve-out

key_quote: Hypax buys 3A Composites Mobility in carve-out transaction in July 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Hypax acquiring composites/materials business for mobility sector
notes: Lightweight materials for transportation applications

key_quote: KPS Capital Partners to acquire the Engineered Materials Business of Crane Company (Crane Composites) for $227M in December 2024.
buyer_intelligence: Deal announced Dec 2024, likely closed early 2025
notes: Engineered materials/composites carve-out

key_quote: Montagu and Kohlberg announced a definitive agreement to acquire Teleflex Medical OEM from Teleflex Incorporated for $1.5 billion in a carve-out transaction in December 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Two PE firms partnering on carve-out of medical OEM division
notes: Medical device manufacturing carve-out

key_quote: KPS Capital Partners announced it entered into a definitive agreement with Albemarle Corporation to acquire a controlling stake in Ketjen Corporation's refining catalyst solutions business. KPS and Albemarle will own approximately 51% and 49% of Ketjen at close respectively.
buyer_intelligence: KPS acquiring controlling 51% stake, Albemarle retaining 49%. Transaction expected to close Q1 2026.
notes: Leading global manufacturer of advanced catalyst solutions for crude oil and renewable feedstocks. Expected close Q1 2026.

key_quote: Carlyle and Invesco announced an agreement for Carlyle to acquire intelliflo from Invesco. The purchase price is up to $200 million, comprised of $135 million at closing (expected in Q4 2025) and up to $65 million in potential future earn outs.
buyer_intelligence: Carlyle supporting carve-out of cloud-based practice management software for financial advisors. Expected close Q4 2025.
notes: Cloud-based practice management software for financial advisors

key_quote: Carlyle announced it agreed to acquire a diversified FPSO (Floating Production, Storage and Offloading) business from Altera Infrastructure Group, owned by Brookfield Asset Management in September 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Carlyle leveraging strong track record in energy carve-outs (Neptune Energy, Assala Energy, SierraCol). Seller is Brookfield.
notes: FPSO operations - highly complex offshore energy infrastructure

key_quote: Carlyle Group announced it is to acquire Advance Auto Parts Inc.'s Worldpac unit for $1.5bn.
buyer_intelligence: Carlyle has invested around $13bn in industrial carve outs over the past two decades
notes: Auto parts distribution carve-out

key_quote: In February 2025, CD&R agreed to acquire a 50% stake in Opella from Sanofi. This represents a carve-out of Sanofi's consumer healthcare business.
buyer_intelligence: CD&R acquiring 50% stake in Sanofi's consumer healthcare division. Anticipated closing Q2 2025 at earliest.
notes: Consumer healthcare carve-out from major pharma

key_quote: AURELIUS entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Xylem Inc.'s international smart meter division in October 2025, which generated approximately $250m in revenues in 2024 and employs more than 800 people.
buyer_intelligence: AURELIUS specializing in carve-outs of non-core divisions
notes: Smart meter manufacturing and technology division

key_quote: The largest private equity carve-out announced so far in 2025 is Thoma Bravo LP's proposed $10.55 billion acquisition of portions of the digital aviation solutions business of US airplane manufacturer The Boeing Co.
buyer_intelligence: Largest PE carve-out of 2025. Thoma Bravo specializes in software/tech carve-outs
notes: Massive digital aviation software carve-out - largest deal of year

key_quote: Brookfield to buy Fosber in $900m carve-out in December 2025. Fosber designs and manufactures high-speed corrugating machinery.
buyer_intelligence: Brookfield acquiring Fosber - need to identify seller
notes: Corrugating machinery manufacturer - seller not clearly identified in search results

key_quote: Stago, a global leader in diagnostics and hemostasis specialist, entered exclusive negotiations with ARCHIMED-led consortium to acquire a majority stake in the group in December 2025.
buyer_intelligence: ARCHIMED acquiring majority stake. La Caisse investing as minority investor. Expected close Q2 2026.
notes: Diagnostics and hemostasis specialist. Exclusive negotiations entered Dec 2025.

key_quote: Advent, a leading global private equity investor, entered exclusive negotiations to acquire Kereis from Bridgepoint in May 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Advent acquiring from Bridgepoint (PE-to-PE deal). European leader in multi-channel personal and SME insurance brokerage.
notes: Insurance brokerage carve-out from Bridgepoint portfolio. Exclusive negotiations May 2025.

key_quote: Britain's Reckitt entered exclusive discussions with private equity firm Advent International regarding the sale of its Essential Home business in June 2025. The deal for the business unit, which makes Air Wick fresheners and Cillit Bang cleaners, could reportedly be announced in the coming weeks.
buyer_intelligence: Major consumer brands carve-out. Deal size reported at $4.8B. Exclusive talks entered June 2025.
notes: Large-scale consumer brands divestiture. Previously excluded from dataset due to unknown buyer - now confirmed as Advent in exclusive talks.

key_quote: Albany International Corp. announced on October 28, 2025 that it is exploring strategic alternatives for its structures assembly business, including a potential sale of all or a part of the business at the Amelia Earhart Drive Facility in Salt Lake City.
buyer_intelligence: Exiting business would enable company to focus on higher-margin, advanced technology component opportunities in AEC segment
notes: Aerospace structures assembly - CH-53K program. Site generated $130M revenue for trailing 12 months ended Sept 30, 2025. Announced Oct 28, 2025.
